snippet: Hello Denys, You've hit your retrieval requests (search + get all) limit. Retrieval requests are now returning 4xx errors. Your existing memories are safe and unaffected — upgrade or enable
subject: Mem0 — Your retrieval quota has been exceeded
body:
Hello Denys,

You've hit your retrieval requests (search + get all) limit. Retrieval requests are now returning 4xx errors. Your existing memories are safe and unaffected — upgrade or enable overages to restore access immediately.

This only affects search and get all API calls — your addition requests are unaffected and will continue to work normally.

Addition requests: 88 / 10000 (0%)
Retrieval requests (search + get all): 1000 / 1000 (100%)
Plan: FREE

Upgrade to Restore Access https://app.mem0.ai/dashboard/usage-and-billing



Need the fastest fix? Enabling overages https://app.mem0.ai/dashboard/usage-and-billing restores access instantly at pay-as-you-go rates. If you'd prefer to wait, your quota resets on the date above.

----------------------------------------

Mem0 will never email you and ask you to disclose or verify your password, credit card, or banking account number.

© 2026 Mem0. All rights reserved.
